allow: Bash(# The pooler IS accessible at aws-0-us-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:6543 # Let''s try using psql directly if available which psql || echo ""psql not found"" # Try Python with pg8000 or psycopg2 python3 -c ""import psycopg2; print\(''psycopg2 available''\)"" || echo ""no psycopg2"" python3 -c ""import pg8000; print\(''pg8000 available''\)"" || echo ""no pg8000"" python3 -c ""import asyncpg; print\(''asyncpg available''\)"" || echo ""no asyncpg"" # Check if any postgres driver is available python3 -c ""import pkg_resources; pkgs=[p.project_name for p in pkg_resources.working_set]; print\([p for p in pkgs if ''pg'' in p.lower\(\) or ''postgres'' in p.lower\(\) or ''psyco'' in p.lower\(\)]\)"")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) types = d.get\(''data'',{}\).get\(''__schema'',{}\).get\(''types'',[]\) for t in types: if t.get\(''name''\) and not t[''name''].startswith\(''__''\) and t.get\(''fields''\): print\(f""=== {t[''name'']} ===""\) for f in \(t[''fields''] or []\): print\(f"" {f[''name'']}: {f[''type''][''name''] or f[''type''][''kind'']}""\) ")
